MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Renee Scott.
Attorney Tony Ruch appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Leandra Butler is present.
Attorney Zach Tornan representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of MAR-19-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
